outcomes.description: Handle CRUD operations on the items collection, including deletion with item-existence validation and automatic audit-trail capture via a PostgreSQL database trigger.

scenarios.scenario: Delete item by ID with existence validation
scenarios.description: System receives DELETE /api/items/{item_id}, queries ItemRepository.get_by_id against the items table (db.query(Item).filter(Item.id == item_id).first()), raises HTTPException 404 with detail 'Item not found' if absent, otherwise calls ItemRepository.delete to execute db.delete(item) + db.commit() on the items table. The PostgreSQL trigger audit_items_trigger fires AFTER DELETE FOR EACH ROW and executes audit_trigger_func() which INSERTs into audit_logs (action='DELETE', record_id=OLD.id, created_at=NOW()). Returns HTTP 200 {"status": "ok"} on success.

actions.description: Path parameter: item_id (int, required). No request body. No authentication guard configured on this endpoint. Returns HTTP 200 {"status": "ok"} on successful deletion.

ItemRepository.get_by_id(item_id) → db.query(Item).filter(Item.id == item_id).first() against the items table; returns Item object (columns: id int PK, name str, description str, completed bool, created_at datetime, updated_at datetime) or None.
If item is None, ItemService raises HTTPException(status_code=404, detail='Item not found'); request processing halts and a 404 response is returned to the caller without executing any delete.

ItemRepository.delete(item) → db.delete(item) followed by db.commit(); permanently removes the Item row from the items table (SQLAlchemy ORM). Affected columns: id, name, description, completed, created_at, updated_at.

actions.action: Insert audit log entry via database trigger
actions.description: PostgreSQL trigger audit_items_trigger fires AFTER DELETE ON items FOR EACH ROW → audit_logs table; calls audit_trigger_func() which executes INSERT INTO audit_logs (table_name='items', action='DELETE', record_id=OLD.id, created_at=NOW()); managed at database level automatically.
Returns HTTP 200 with JSON body {"status": "ok"} to the caller. No response_model schema is declared on this endpoint in FastAPI.

skippedComponents.reason: ItemResponse schema not used by delete endpoint; no response_model configured; read during general discovery.

sideEffects.identifier: audit_trigger_func → audit_logs table (INSERT on DELETE trigger)

branchesAndErrors.handledAs: Reject missing item action in Validate item existence step
